summary: Make runtime composition, provider plugins, settings sections, and stage contracts explicit.
rationale: This slice moves runtime assembly into a dedicated composition root, introduces a provider adapter plugin registry, exposes typed settings section views without changing the environment boundary, and shares runtime stage state contracts across stage modules.
config_behavior_rationale: The config change only adds immutable typed section projections over existing validated AppSettings fields; runtime/provider behavior changes consume existing settings through explicit composition boundaries.
verification: uv run pytest tests/test_composition_boundaries.py tests/test_provider_plugins.py tests/test_settings_sections.py tests/test_runtime_stage_contracts.py -q
uv run pytest tests/test_provider_registry.py tests/test_runtime_services.py tests/test_runtime_production_contract.py -q

uv run ruff check src/seektalent/config.py src/seektalent/providers/plugins.py src/seektalent/providers/registry.py src/seektalent/runtime/composition.py src/seektalent/runtime/controller_runtime.py src/seektalent/runtime/finalize_runtime.py src/seektalent/runtime/stage_contracts.py src/seektalent/source_adapters/runtime_factory.py src/seektalent/source_adapters/runtime_composition.py tests/test_composition_boundaries.py tests/test_provider_plugins.py tests/test_runtime_stage_contracts.py tests/test_settings_sections.py
uv run ty check src tests tools
uv run pytest tests/test_liepin_worker_client.py tests/test_liepin_opencli_worker_client.py tests/test_liepin_cli.py tests/test_liepin_boundaries.py -q
deletion_targets: source adapter runtime factory acting as the composition root
runtime package importing concrete provider/source adapter assembly
provider selection hidden behind hard-coded branch logic
large untyped AppSettings clusters at internal runtime call sites
runtime stage TypedDict contracts duplicated inside individual stage modules
risks: This is an explicit boundary slice, not a plugin discovery system; default provider plugins remain locally registered.
AppSettings remains the env parsing boundary; typed section views are immutable projections to avoid speculative settings hierarchy churn.
